pi_items.source: Task description specifies this as expected channel name to be created
Task description: 'include filter logic that checks the message type field (MSH-9) to only allow ADT messages through'. Verified by examining test messages in /workspace/assets/
Verified by parsing HL7 messages: ADT message has MSH-9 field 'ADT^A01^ADT_A01', ORU message has 'ORU^R01'. Filter value 'ADT' correctly distinguishes between message types.
Task description explicitly states: 'listen on TCP port 6662 for HL7 messages'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh and task description.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a NextGen Connect (Mirth Connect) channel named 'ADT Filter Channel' that filters HL7 messages by type (MSH-9 field). The filter must accept only ADT (Admission, Discharge, Transfer) messages (identified by 'ADT' in MSH-9 field) and reject ORU (Observation Result) messages. The channel must listen on TCP port 6662. Test data: hl7-v2.3-adt-a01-1.hl7 contains an ADT^A01 message that should pass the filter, and hl7-v2.3-oru-r01-1.hl7 contains an ORU^R01 message that should be filtered out.
